ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "framework" TEXT /* ML framework used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the datasets table */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the metrics */,
  "auth_dim" INTEGER /* Authorization dimension of the model */,
  "feature_dim" INTEGER /* Feature dimension of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "auth_train_time" REAL /* Authorization training time in seconds */,
  "feature_train_time" REAL /* Feature training time in seconds */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score */,
  "validation_loss" REAL /* Validation loss */,
  "test_loss" REAL /* Test loss */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to model_configurations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser/device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* Detailed configuration settings (e.g., hyperparameters, architecture) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON object storing hyperparameter settings */,
  "training_dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training dataset */,
  "validation_dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the validation dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp when the model was created

ID of the model associated with the metrics
